home.heroAlt: We Are the Soul of Jalisco's Fiesta.

preOrder.descMobileLine1: Skip the line and grab your cantarito
preOrder.descDesktopLine1: Skip the line and grab your cantarito

reservation.title: RESERVATION?
reservation.subtitle: ONLY IF YOU'RE BRINGING THE WHOLE CREW.
reservation.description: There's always room to start the fiesta.
reservation.warning: Reservations available for groups of 60+ guests, minimum pre-paid consumption of $10,000 MXN required.

shuttle.title: GÜERO SHUTTLE
shuttle.subtitle: The plan starts the moment you hop on.
shuttle.descMobileLine1: Ride with the Güero Shuttle and
shuttle.descMobileLine3: no hassle, just the fiesta waiting for you.
shuttle.description: Ride with the Güero Shuttle and arrive stress-free, no driving, no hassle, just the fiesta waiting for you.

eventBanner.descLine1: Bring the Giant Cantarito and the
eventBanner.descLine2: full cantarito vibe to your party,
eventBanner.descFull: Bring the Giant Cantarito and the full cantarito vibe to your party, wedding, or corporate event.

footer.address: Carretera Internacional, Guadalajara–Tepic Highway Km 49 #4970, La Meza, 45380 Amatitán, Jalisco, Mexico
footer.hours: Open 365 days a year, 9:00 AM – 12:00 AM
footer.noFranchise: This is our one and only location.

about.sinceDescLine1: Since 1997, in Amatitán, at the heart of the
about.sinceDescLine2: Tequila Route, a story began that no one
about.sinceDescLine3: imagined would become a lasting tradition.
about.gueroIntro: It was born from a simple yet powerful idea:
about.gueroQuote: "Celebrate what's ours the way it should be."
about.gueroDescLine1: With pride, music that moves you, and an
about.gueroDescLine2: atmosphere that brings people together, no
about.gueroClosing: What started as a gathering spot became a local icon.
about.ritualTitle: And that icon became a ritual.
about.ritualDesc1Line1: El Güero turned the traditional cantarito into
about.ritualDesc1Line2: a symbol of celebration with the creation of
about.ritualDesc2Line1: A signature recipe that honors the essence of
about.ritualDesc3: Its preparation is part of the show.
about.ritualDesc4Line1: Expert hands, natural charisma, and an
about.ritualDesc4Line2: atmosphere that's impossible not to catch.
about.formulaTitle: The formula has been clear from the start and it hasn't changed since.
about.amatitanDesc1Line1: Over time, people began saying it themselves:
about.amatitanDesc1Line2: "If you're doing the Tequila Route, you have to stop at El Güero."
about.amatitanDesc2Line1: We became a must-stop along the Tequila Route
about.amatitanDesc2Line2: where fiesta is identity and Jalisco pride is
about.amatitanClosingLine2: the people who visit us say it best.
about.bannerLine1: Every cantarito is prepared right in front of you.
about.bannerLine2: Every song is sung at full voice.
about.bannerLine3: Every visit becomes a story to remember.
about.purposeDesc: To keep the authentic Jalisco fiesta alive and growing, creating experiences that bring people together, celebrate our traditions, and turn every visit into a shared memory that transcends generations and borders.
about.soulLine1: We are the soul of Jalisco's fiesta.
about.soulGrowth: And since 1997, it hasn't stopped growing.
